subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letter dated the fifteenth of Muharram in the year 1327 hath been received, and its contents have become known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه پانزدهم محرم سنه ۱۳۲۷ واصل گردید مضمون معلوم شد
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @non-participation in politics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @martyrs and martyrdom, @past, present and future of Iran, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
